definitions.text: ikke lenger i vannrett vassrett stilling
definitions.translation: no longer in a horizontal position

examples.en: the roof is out of level

examples.no: mannen framsto helt ute av vater da ambulansen kom
examples.en: the man seemed completely out of sorts when the ambulance arrived

examples.no: verden oppleves litt ute av vater for tiden
examples.en: the world feels a little out of kilter these days
